name: Coconut Oil (Virgin)
description: A saturated fat rich in lauric acid (~50%) with potent antimicrobial properties and lipophilic biofilm penetration.
chemicalName: Mixture of triglycerides; primarily glyceryl trilaurate
formula: Mixture; predominant fatty acid: lauric acid C₁₂H₂₄O₂
appearance: White solid below 76°F (24°C); clear liquid above; pleasant coconut aroma (virgin)
solubility: Insoluble in water; miscible with other oils and organic solvents
chemistry: ~50% lauric acid disrupts bacterial lipid membranes. Lipophilic — penetrates biofilms. In deodorant, targets Corynebacterium (primary odor bacteria).
warnings: Comedogenic for some faces (4/5). Melts at 76°F. Clogs drains.
